feature: Fix CI: Replace broken self-hosted workflow with cloud-based CI
workflow_rationale: Single-service task with clear, sequential steps: delete broken workflow, create new workflow, verify existing workflows are valid, add badge to README. No complex dependencies or multi-service coordination needed.

phases.name: Replace Broken CI Workflow
phases.description: Delete ai-coding-job.yml (broken self-hosted workflow) and create ci.yml (cloud-based CI using ubuntu-latest)

subtasks.notes: Successfully deleted .github/workflows/ai-coding-job.yml. Verification passed. Committed with message: auto-claude: subtask-1-1 - Delete broken ai-coding-job.yml workflow

subtasks.description: Create ci.yml workflow with ubuntu-latest runner and make check

verification.command: grep -q 'runs-on: ubuntu-latest' .github/workflows/ci.yml && grep -q 'cargo test && cargo clippy' .github/workflows/ci.yml && echo 'OK' || echo 'FAIL'

subtasks.notes: Created ci.yml workflow with ubuntu-latest runner running cargo test && cargo clippy. Follows patterns from repo-health.yml and release.yml. Verification passes successfully.

phases.name: Audit Existing Workflows
phases.description: Verify repo-health.yml and release.yml are valid cloud CI workflows (no changes needed)

subtasks.description: Audit repo-health.yml and release.yml for cloud compatibility

verification.instructions: Verify both workflows use cloud runners (macos-latest), no self-hosted references, no bop serve dependencies. Both are already valid - no changes needed.

subtasks.notes: Audit complete: both repo-health.yml and release.yml are cloud-compatible. Both use macos-latest runners, no self-hosted references, no bop serve dependencies. Created audit-report.md documenting findings.

phases.name: Add CI Badge to README
phases.description: Add GitHub Actions CI badge to README.md

subtasks.description: Add CI workflow badge to README.md after title
subtasks.notes: Added CI workflow badge to README.md after title. Badge displays build status from GitHub Actions ci.yml workflow.

phases.name: Verify CI Changes Locally
phases.description: Run make check locally to ensure the new CI workflow commands will pass

subtasks.description: Run make check to verify all tests, clippy, and formatting pass
subtasks.notes: Successfully ran make check - all 318 unit tests, 10 dispatcher tests, 17 job control tests, 4 merge gate tests, and 91 additional tests passed. Clippy and formatting checks also passed with no warnings.

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1, operate on different file sets (workflows vs README)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential is fine - task is quick and simple

acceptance_criteria: ai-coding-job.yml is deleted or rewritten to not silently fail

verification_steps.name: Verify ci.yml exists and uses cloud runner
Run make check locally
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests, clippy, and fmt checks pass

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk - only modifying CI configuration files (YAML) and adding a badge to README. No functional code changes. The new ci.yml runs existing make check commands that are already tested.

checks.name: CI workflow syntax valid
checks.command: yamllint .github/workflows/ci.yml || echo 'yamllint not installed - manual review required'

checks.name: All workflows use cloud runners
checks.command: ! grep -r 'runs-on: self-hosted' .github/workflows/ || echo 'FAIL: self-hosted runners found'
checks.description: Ensure no self-hosted runner references remain

previous_issues_resolved: CI command missing clippy error flag

issues.title: CI command missing clippy error flag
issues.fix_required: Add -- -D warnings to cargo clippy command

issues.title: CI command missing format check
issues.fix_required: Add cargo fmt --check to CI command

issues.title: Missing rust toolchain components
issues.fix_required: Add components: clippy, rustfmt to rust-toolchain action
